Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Tuttle of The Chandler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Plaintiff Russell Brimer.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order and separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Nor reported. (302/HK)
